task_title: Fix context init: decouple minimal profile from universal wiki hierarchy

changes.summary: Decouple minimal profile from scaffold hierarchy
details: Added context/wiki/index.md creation for all profiles (line 247)
Added clarifying comment for scaffold vs minimal profile separation (line 303-304)
Updated buildWikiAgentsMarkdown() to provide profile-specific guidance: minimal = 'blank canvas', scaffold = 'starter hierarchy. Adapt or reduce it'
Minimal profile now creates only index.md + AGENTS.md (no concepts/, entities/, decisions/, modules/, contradictions/, reports/ directories)

changes.summary: Clarify profile semantics in CLI help
details: Updated contextInitSpec.options[0].description to explain: minimal = 'bare context/wiki/', wiki/codebase/research = 'scaffold profiles'
Help text now states: 'Scaffold profiles provide starting points; adapt or reduce after first analysis.'

notes: Fixes design gap: context init --profile minimal now aligns with AGENTS.md guidance to 'choose the smallest wiki hierarchy that fits this project'
Minimal profile is rare in practice (default is wiki), so impact is low-risk
Scaffold profiles (wiki, codebase, research) unchanged—no breaking changes
AGENTS.md guidance now matches actual file creation behavior for each profile
